title: Lock 'n' Pick
description: A mod that adds a full lock and lockpicking system to Minecraft, complete with keys, lockpicks, and a Skyrim-style lockpicking minigame.
body:
# Lock'n'Pick

**Lock'n'Pick** is a mod that adds a full lock and lockpicking system to Minecraft, complete with keys, lockpicks, and a Skyrim-style lockpicking minigame.

Join Us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/6SM9WvgcY6)

[![Join our Discord](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/6SM9WvgcY6?theme=discord-inverted&logoColor=7CF9A4)](https://discord.gg/6SM9WvgcY6)

_Do you want to protect something bigger? Give a look to [Claimorous!](https://modrinth.com/mod/claimorous)_

***

 

![using key](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1206/757/locknpick.gif)

![lockpicking showcase](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1207/180/lockpicking-showcase-png.png)



## Features

### 🔒 Locks and Tiers

*   Craftable **locks** with multiple difficulty tiers and lockpicks with different durability
*   Placing a lock on a block will give you the **original key**. Once locked, blocks can be broken **only by the lock owner**.
*   **Every block can be protected**. Default settings include main interactable vanilla blocks (doors, chest, etc.) but you can add whatever block you want through IDs or Tags (lever, buttons, modded machines and so on).

### 🗝️ Keys

*   **Keys**: Each lock has a specific original key.
*   **Blank keys**: Craft them with original keys to make duplicates.
*   **Keychain**: Handy item to group all your keys in one place, right click keys in inventory to merge/unmerge them.
*   **Master Key**: Available in creative only, it opens every lock.

### 🎮 Lockpicking Minigame

Trying to pick a lock brings up a **Skyrim-inspired minigame**:

*   Move the pick around to find the sweet spot
*   If you succeed, the lock breaks leaving the block unprotected
*   If you fail, the lockpick might break instead
*   Each lock and pick tier affects how hard the minigame is

 

![Lockpicking](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1206/778/lockpicking-gif.gif)

 

## ⚙️ Fully Configurable

The mod comes with a flexible config system that lets you tweak:

*   Which blocks can be locked (both using block IDs or tags)
*   Lock difficulty per tier
*   Lockpick durability per tier
*   How many failed attempts before a lockpick breaks
*   And much more

## Config Parameters

*   `sweetSpontHint`: Enable or disable animation that facilitate lockpicking during the minigame,
*   `damageChance`: Chance to damage lockpicks when in wrong spot (min 0, max 1),
*   `keychainMaxKeys`: Maximum number of key that a keychain can hold (min 2),
*   `lockVisibility`: Show locks indicators,
*   `dropLockOnBreak`: Drop locks when breaking protected blocks,
*   `ownersNeedKey`: Owners of protected blocks still need keys to interact,
*   `lockpickDurability`: Durability of lockpicks (based on tier),
*   `lockDifficulty`: Difficulty of a lock to be picked (based on tier),
*   `protectableBlockIds`: List of IDs of blocks that can be locked,
*   `protectableBlockTags`: List of Tags of blocks that can be locked

Perfect for customizing the challenge in your world or server.

***

_“Just one more lock to pick… then I’m done. I swear.”_
